metadata.analysis: Council of Nine — D/I/R Strategic Analysis of K=9 Topology
metadata.framework: D/I/R composition mapping onto K=9 market basins

C0.personality: Mild bullish drift with integration dominant — market consolidating upward around VWAP, moderate momentum confirmation

top_3_destinations.interpretation: drift reversal — bullish drift flips to bearish drift
cooling into quiet base
amplification — drift intensifies into strong I(R)+

C0.edge_assessment: STRONG EDGE — best PnL basin by far ($4116), asymmetric payoff (avg win 4.3x avg loss), ETH and SOL are the edge carriers

C1.personality: Bearish trending — recursive feedback loops dominate, OBV deeply negative, low integration. Self-reinforcing downtrend with structural conviction

top_3_destinations.interpretation: bearish trend relaxes into bearish equilibrium
regime flip — bear trend exhausts into bullish integration
trend dies into quiet base

C1.edge_assessment: NO DATA — stickiest basin (0.928) and longest dwell (13.96h mean, 435h max). Current strategy almost never trades here. This is the 'bearish winter' regime — the market spends 18% of its time here

C2.personality: Strong bullish integration — RSI elevated (1.36z), VWAP positive, ADX confirming trend. The amplified version of C0 — conviction is higher, integration pulling harder

top_3_destinations.interpretation: DANGER — strong bullish integration collapses into bearish trend
de-escalation — strong drift relaxes to mild drift
energy dissipation into quiet base

C2.edge_assessment: PARADOX — 80% win rate but negative PnL. The one loss ($-150) wipes out four wins. High win rate is real but needs tight stop protection. Small sample (n=5)

C3.personality: Volatile breakout — ATR dominant (2.44z), structure dissolving. The market is making violent distinctions. High energy, directional but chaotic

top_3_destinations.interpretation: breakout resolves into bullish drift — breakout was upside
volatility persists, sign flips — breakout whipsaws
breakout energy absorbed, settles into bearish drift

C3.edge_assessment: ANTI-EDGE — 25% win rate, worst PnL density. v3 already blacklists this. Correct. Only ETH shows marginal edge here. Structure dissolution is untradeable with current strategy

C4.personality: Extreme bearish volatility with integration — RSI deeply oversold (-1.79z), wide bands, massive VWAP distance. The market is trying to integrate but structure keeps breaking. Capitulation zone

top_3_destinations.interpretation: volatility subsides, bearish equilibrium takes hold
sign flip — bearish vol becomes bullish breakout
normalization into mild bearish drift

trading_stats.edge_note: Zero trades — strategy never fires in capitulation

C4.edge_assessment: UNTESTED — the rarest active basin (2.96%). Deeply oversold with extreme negative VWAP distance. Theoretically prime mean-reversion territory, but current strategy ignores it entirely. The C4→C3 transition (6.95%) is a potential long setup: capitulation → breakout

C5.personality: Low energy everything — the anti-breakout. Compressed ATR, tight bands, no momentum, no trend. The market is doing nothing. The quiet between storms

top_3_destinations.interpretation: quiet base breaks into bearish drift
quiet base breaks into bullish drift
jump to strong bullish integration

trading_stats.edge_note: Zero trades — correctly identified as no-signal environment

C5.edge_assessment: SIT-OUT — largest basin (21.6%), no signal. But the EXIT transitions matter: C5→C7 (6.14%) and C5→C0 (4.14%) are early-warning breakout indicators. The market spends 1/5 of its time here waiting

C6.personality: Bearish integration with trend confirmation — RSI oversold (-1.15z), below VWAP, strong ADX (1.11z). Structured bearish move with conviction. Not panic — organized selling

top_3_destinations.interpretation: structured selling intensifies into full bear trend
regime flip — bearish integration reverses to bullish
selling exhausts into quiet base

trading_stats.edge_note: Zero trades — short-side opportunity completely unexploited

C6.edge_assessment: UNTESTED SHORT OPPORTUNITY — 11.37% of market time with high ADX and negative RSI/VWAP. The mirror of C2 (bullish structured). If we could short, this is the structured sell basin. As a long-only filter: strong SIT-OUT signal

C7.personality: Mild bearish drift — the mirror of C0. Moderate RSI/VWAP negative, short dwell. The market's default 'slightly bearish' mode. Quick transitions in and out

top_3_destinations.interpretation: bearish drift dies into quiet base
polarity flip — bearish drift becomes bullish drift
drift intensifies into structured selling

C7.edge_assessment: ANTI-EDGE — most traded basin (35 trades) but worst absolute PnL ($-1463). Win/loss sizes nearly symmetric = no edge. ETH is the main bleeder ($-1818 from 11 trades). BTC is the exception (3/3 wins). SOL marginal. Trading longs in a bearish drift basin is structural alpha destruction

C8.personality: Extreme bullish volatility with integration — RSI overbought (1.63z), bands wide (2.82z), massive positive VWAP distance. Euphoric breakout with mean-reversion pressure building. The blow-off top zone

top_3_destinations.interpretation: volatility subsides but bullish integration holds
euphoria continues as breakout momentum
blow-off settles into mild bullish drift

C8.edge_assessment: MODERATE EDGE — positive PnL ($906) with 2.6:1 win/loss ratio. ADA is the star ($738 from 5 trades). The paradox: sub-50% win rate but big winners dwarf losers. Classic momentum capture in volatile bullish conditions

D_dominant_basins.market_meaning: The market is making distinctions — structure is breaking or reforming. ATR and BBW dominate.
D_dominant_basins.C3_interpretation: Active breakout — ATR at 2.44z means boundaries are literally shattering. High energy state. Short-lived (4.21% occupancy). When D dominates with positive sign, the market is CREATING new price levels, not respecting old ones.
D_dominant_basins.C5_interpretation: The inverse — anti-breakout. All features suppressed. D is technically the largest axis but all magnitudes are tiny (0.605, 0.080, 0.513). This is D-dominant by default because I and R are essentially zero. The market has exhausted its ability to make distinctions.
D_dominant_basins.strategic_principle: D-dominant states are TRANSITION states. C3 is a breakout you ride or avoid. C5 is a compression you wait through. Neither rewards patient position-holding — they're about timing entries at the boundaries.

I_dominant_basins.market_meaning: The market is integrating — pulling prices toward equilibrium. RSI and VWAP distance dominate the signal.
I_dominant_basins.positive_sign: C0, C2, C8 — bullish integration. Price is above VWAP, RSI elevated. The market is integrating UPWARD. These are the long-edge basins.
I_dominant_basins.negative_sign: C4, C6, C7 — bearish integration. Price below VWAP, RSI depressed. The market is integrating DOWNWARD. For a long-only strategy, these are danger zones.
I_dominant_basins.volatile_vs_calm: C8 and C4 are I(D) — integration competing with distinction (high vol). C0, C2, C6, C7 are I(R) — integration flowing with recursion (trend-aligned).
I_dominant_basins.strategic_principle: I-dominant states ARE the tradeable universe for long-only. The sign determines direction: positive = go, negative = wait. The secondary axis (D vs R) determines position sizing: I(R) = trend-aligned, size up; I(D) = volatile, size down.

R_dominant_basins.market_meaning: Recursive feedback loops dominate — the market is self-reinforcing. OBV deeply negative (-1.32z) = sustained selling pressure. ADX negative = trend weakening. The recursive element is the PERSISTENCE of the bear regime, not directional momentum.
R_dominant_basins.C1_interpretation: This is the bear winter. Stickiest basin (0.928 self-transition), longest dwell (mean 13.96h, max 435h = 18 days). The market enters R(D)− and stays. Only 1 trade ever executed here. The recursion is: selling begets selling, but slowly — not panic, just persistent pressure.
R_dominant_basins.strategic_principle: R-dominant states are ENDURANCE states. The market is in a feedback loop. For long-only: sit out completely. For hedging: this is where you want short exposure. The long dwell times mean early detection of C1 entry saves significant capital.

C0.stop_strategy: Wide stops (allow 3-4% drawdown) — avg win is 16% vs avg loss 3.7%
C0.exit_strategy: LET IT RUN — avg duration 207h means winning trades develop over days/weeks
C0.rationale: Best basin by every metric: $4116 total PnL, 50% WR, 4.3:1 win/loss ratio. Mild bullish drift with moderate conviction. This is where the strategy earns its living. ETH alone contributes $2452. The key insight: C0 is NOT a breakout — it's a drift. Patience is rewarded. Wide stops prevent shakeouts in a basin where the median dwell is only 3h but winning trades run for days.

transition_triggers.C0_to_C7: EXIT immediately — polarity flip means drift direction reversed
transition_triggers.C0_to_C2: HOLD and consider adding — drift is amplifying

C1.exit_strategy: If holding longs from another basin, EXIT on C1 entry
C1.rationale: 18% of market time with 0.928 stickiness and mean dwell of 14h. The bear winter. Only 1 trade ever executed (a loss). R(D)− means recursive selling with no integration to provide mean-reversion. The market is NOT trying to find equilibrium — it's in a self-reinforcing downdraft. Any long position is fighting the feedback loop.

transition_triggers.C1_to_C2: OPPORTUNITY ALERT — bear trend exhausting into bullish integration. This is the bottom-fishing signal. Wait for C2 confirmation before entering.
transition_triggers.C1_to_C6: NOT YET — still bearish, just less recursive
transition_triggers.C1_to_C5: NEUTRAL — bear trend dying but no bullish catalyst

C2.position_sizing: FULL SIZE (1.0x) — 80% win rate justifies maximum conviction
C2.stop_strategy: TIGHT stops (1.5-2%) — the one loss was -10.5%, a blown stop would have saved $150
C2.exit_strategy: Quick profit-taking on first sign of C2→C1 transition (4.8% probability)
C2.rationale: 80% win rate (n=5). Strong bullish integration with trend confirmation (ADX 0.93z). The amplified C0. BUT: the risk is catastrophic reversal — C2→C1 at 4.8% is the highest-probability regime disaster. The strategy: go max size with a tight stop. Catch the 80% wins, cut the 20% losses fast before they become -10% blowups. Small sample warning: n=5 is not statistically significant. Treat as hypothesis, not proven edge.

transition_triggers.C2_to_C1: EMERGENCY EXIT — this is the cliff. Strong bullish integration collapsing into bear trend. Exit ALL positions immediately.

C3.recommended_approach: BLACKLISTED — do not trade (confirmed by v3)
C3.stop_strategy: If forced to trade: ultra-tight stops (1%)
C3.exit_strategy: Immediate exit on any entry from another basin
C3.rationale: 25% win rate, $-459 PnL. D(R)+ means structure is dissolving — ATR at 2.44z makes everything a coin flip. SOL loses $-427 here. v3 correctly blacklists this. The ONLY potential play: if you detect C3→C0 transition (6.9%), it means the breakout resolved bullish — but you'd need to be positioned BEFORE the transition, not during C3 residence.

transition_triggers.C3_to_C0: BUY SIGNAL — breakout resolved upward into bullish drift. Enter C0 position.
transition_triggers.C3_to_C4: DANGER — breakout flipping to bearish volatility. Full defense.
transition_triggers.C3_to_C7: WAIT — breakout energy absorbed but direction is mildly bearish

C4.stop_strategy: Wide stops — this is volatile (ATR 1.05z, BBW 2.62z)
C4.exit_strategy: Target C4→C3 transition (6.95%) for breakout capture
pair_preference: Unknown — no trade data. Hypothesis: oversold alts (ADA, SOL)
C4.rationale: Zero trades but theoretically the most interesting unexploited basin. I(D)− means integration is FIGHTING distinction — RSI at -1.79z and VWAP at -2.38z are extreme oversold. The market WANTS to mean-revert but volatility keeps pushing lower. The C4→C3 corridor at 6.95% represents the capitulation-to-breakout transition. This is where contrarian fortunes are made — IF you survive the volatility. Small size is mandatory.
C4.novel_concept: C4 bottom-fishing: when C4 is detected, open small long positions targeting the C4→C3→C0 two-step transition. Expected holding period: 6-12 hours (C4 dwell mean 6.08h).

transition_triggers.C4_to_C3: OPPORTUNITY — capitulation flipping to breakout. Consider adding size.
transition_triggers.C4_to_C6: EXIT — volatility subsiding but direction still bearish

C5.recommended_approach: FULL SIT-OUT — use as breakout detection trigger
C5.rationale: 21.6% of market time, zero signal. D(R)− with all magnitudes near zero. The market is doing nothing. The value of C5 is not in trading it — it's in detecting EXITS from it. C5→C7 (6.14%) and C5→C0 (4.14%) tell you which direction the next move goes. If you can detect the first candle of a C5 exit, you get an early entry into the next trending basin.

transition_triggers.C5_to_C0: BUY — quiet base breaking bullish. This is the breakout entry.
transition_triggers.C5_to_C7: WAIT — base breaking bearish. No longs.
transition_triggers.C5_to_C2: AGGRESSIVE BUY — base jumping directly to strong bullish integration (rare, 1.27%)

C6.recommended_approach: SIT-OUT for longs (SHORT opportunity if available)
C6.stop_strategy: If holding longs, tighten stops significantly
C6.exit_strategy: Exit all longs on C6 entry
C6.rationale: 11.4% of market time. I(R)− with high ADX (1.11z) — this is structured selling with conviction. The mirror image of C2. Zero trades in history suggests the strategy correctly avoids this, but it should be ACTIVELY used as a defense signal. C6 entry = reduce all long exposure immediately.

transition_triggers.C6_to_C2: REVERSAL SIGNAL — structured selling reversing to structured buying. Strong buy signal.
transition_triggers.C6_to_C1: DANGER ESCALATION — structured selling becoming recursive bear. Maximum defense.

C7.position_sizing: REDUCED (0.3-0.5x) — negative expected value at full size
C7.stop_strategy: TIGHT stops (2%) — avg win and avg loss nearly equal, must cut losers fast
C7.exit_strategy: Quick exits — median dwell only 2h, fastest-transitioning basin
C7.rationale: 35 trades, $-1463 PnL. Most traded and worst performing basin. BUT: BTC is 3/3 ($+377) and SOL is marginal positive ($+323). ETH alone bleeds $-1818. The basin is mildly bearish (I(R)−) — the current strategy is trading longs into a headwind. The fix isn't to avoid C7 entirely (14.3% of market time) but to be HIGHLY selective on pairs. BTC appears to have unique dynamics in mild bearish drift — perhaps its relative strength provides contrarian alpha.

transition_triggers.C7_to_C0: FLIP — bearish drift becoming bullish. Enter aggressively.
transition_triggers.C7_to_C5: EXIT — drift dying into quiet base. No edge.
transition_triggers.C7_to_C6: DANGER — mild bearish drift intensifying into structured selling

C8.stop_strategy: Trailing stops — let winners run, cut at 3-4%
C8.exit_strategy: Watch for C8→C2 (6.8%) continuation vs C8→C3 (3.8%) as divergence warning
C8.rationale: $906 total PnL, 42.3% WR but 2.6:1 win/loss ratio. I(D)+ = bullish euphoria with high volatility. ADA is the star ($738 from 5 trades) — it thrives in euphoric conditions. The mean-reversion pressure is BUILDING but hasn't triggered yet. Trailing stops let you ride the euphoria while protecting against the inevitable snap-back. The C8→C2 transition (6.8%) is continuation — bullish vol subsiding into structured buying. The C8→C3 transition (3.8%) is the warning — euphoria becoming chaotic breakout.

transition_triggers.C8_to_C2: HOLD — volatility subsiding but bull intact. Consider adding ADA.
transition_triggers.C8_to_C3: TIGHTEN STOPS — euphoria becoming chaotic. Breakout may fail.
transition_triggers.C8_to_C0: RELAX — euphoria normalizing into mild drift. Widen stops.

high_value_corridors.logic: Bearish drift flipping to bullish drift. C0 is the best-performing basin. The flip is common (1794 occurrences). Strategy: when C7 dwell time exceeds median (2h) and RSI starts rising, pre-position for C0 entry.
Quiet base breaking bullish. Less common than C5→C7 (which is bearish), so the bullish breakout is the minority outcome. Strategy: wait for first C0 classification confirmation before entering.
Capitulation → breakout → bullish drift. The full V-recovery pattern. Extremely rare but extremely profitable if caught. Strategy: detect C4, open small long, add on C3 confirmation, ride to C0.
high_value_corridors.estimated_value: VERY HIGH if hit — capturing the full reversal

high_value_corridors.logic: Bear winter exhausting into bullish integration. This is THE macro reversal signal. C1 is sticky (0.928) so when it finally breaks to C2, it's a structural shift. Strategy: first C2 bar after extended C1 residence = strong long entry.
high_value_corridors.estimated_value: HIGH — C2 has 80% win rate (small sample)

high_value_corridors.logic: Euphoric volatility subsiding into structured buying. The bullish chain C8→C2 means the move has legs. Strategy: if already long from C8, HOLD through this transition.

danger_corridors.logic: Strong bullish integration collapsing into bear trend. This is the cliff edge. C2's positive edge exists ONLY because exits are fast when this transition triggers. Strategy: hard stop-loss, no averaging down.
danger_corridors.risk: CRITICAL — position could be trapped in C1 for 435 hours

danger_corridors.logic: Mild bearish drift intensifying into structured selling. If holding C7 longs (already questionable), this is the deterioration signal.
danger_corridors.risk: HIGH — C6 often leads to C1

danger_corridors.logic: Bullish drift reversing to bearish. Most common non-self transition from C0. This is the normal way winning trades die. Strategy: exit on detection, don't wait for C7 to resolve.
danger_corridors.risk: MODERATE — C7 is negative expectancy for longs

danger_corridors.logic: Structured selling becoming recursive bear trend. If you missed the C6 exit signal, this is the last chance. The C1 trap can last 18 days.

forbidden_transition_implications.C5_cannot_reach_C3_C4_C8: Quiet base never directly becomes extreme volatility. There is ALWAYS an intermediate step. This means no flash crashes from quiet — you get warning.
forbidden_transition_implications.C1_cannot_reach_C3: Bear trend never directly becomes bullish breakout. Bears don't V-reverse into breakouts — they go through C2 or C6 first.
forbidden_transition_implications.C8_cannot_reach_C5_C7: Euphoria never goes directly quiet or mildly bearish. It always transitions through C2 (bullish continuation) or C3 (chaotic) first. Euphoria has INERTIA.

proposal_1.name: Basin-Aware Pair Router
proposal_1.concept: Instead of running the same pair universe across all basins, route specific pairs to specific basins where they have empirical edge.

theoretical_improvement.C7_ETH_elimination: Removing ETH/USDT from C7 saves ~$1818 in losses
theoretical_improvement.total_estimated_improvement: +$2036 over baseline (from C7 pair filtering), bringing estimated total PnL from ~$3010 to ~$5046
theoretical_improvement.caveat: Based on in-sample data. True OOS improvement likely lower. C2 and C8 improvements speculative due to small n.

proposal_2.name: Transition-Triggered Pre-Positioning
proposal_2.concept: Don't wait for the destination basin to be classified. Use the SOURCE basin's dwell time and feature trajectory to predict transitions and pre-position.

C5_breakout_detector.trigger: C5 residence > median dwell (3h) AND RSI_z delta > +0.3 over last 2 candles

C7_flip_detector.trigger: C7 residence > median dwell (2h) AND OBV_z turning positive
C7_flip_detector.abort_on: C7→C6 classification → close and sit out

C4_capitulation_catcher.upsize_on: C3 confirmation with positive OBV delta

C1_thaw_detector.trigger: C1 residence > 2x median dwell (8h) AND OBV_z rising for 3 consecutive candles
C1_thaw_detector.action: Open 0.2x long anticipating C1→C2 macro reversal

theoretical_improvement.early_entry_advantage: Getting into C0 even 2 candles early (2 hours) on a 207h average winning trade is small %, but the C5→C0 corridor fires 1568 times in the dataset
theoretical_improvement.c4_captures: 852 C4 visits × 6.95% C4→C3 × 6.92% C3→C0 = ~4 full V-reversals captured. Even 1-2 of these at 15% return = significant
theoretical_improvement.c1_thaw: 2276 C1 visits × 2.79% exit to C2 = ~64 macro reversals. Catching even 10% at 1.09% avg C2 win = incremental
theoretical_improvement.estimated_total: +5-15% additional return over pair-routing baseline, primarily from C5 breakout detection
theoretical_improvement.caveat: Requires feature-trajectory calculation infrastructure not currently in the strategy. Implementation complexity is HIGH.

proposal_3.name: Regime Defense Shield
proposal_3.concept: Instead of ADDING edge, REMOVE anti-edge. The biggest PnL leak is C7 ($-1463). Rather than optimizing entries, build an active defense system that hard-exits on danger transitions.

kill_switches.name: C7 ETH Firewall
kill_switches.rule: If basin == C7 AND pair == ETH/USDT: block entry, force exit any open position

kill_switches.name: C2→C1 Hard Stop
kill_switches.rule: If current basin transitions from C2 to C1: close ALL positions within 1 candle, no exceptions

kill_switches.name: C3 Total Blacklist Extension
kill_switches.rule: If any OPEN position's current basin becomes C3: close it (not just block new entries)
kill_switches.expected_savings: Current v3 blocks entries but doesn't close existing positions that drift into C3

kill_switches.name: Bearish Chain Alert
kill_switches.rule: If transition path shows C0→C7→C6 in sequence (bullish → mild bear → structured bear): halt all new entries for 24h minimum
kill_switches.expected_savings: Prevents trading into cascading bear transitions

theoretical_improvement.C3_extension: +$100-200 (closing positions that ENTER C3 from neighboring basins)
theoretical_improvement.implementation_complexity: LOW — these are simple conditional checks, no new features needed

with_pair_routing.confidence: MEDIUM — based on in-sample pair filtering

with_defense_shield.confidence: HIGH — removing known losers is more reliable than adding winners

with_all_three.confidence: LOW-MEDIUM — compound effects may not be additive, OOS decay expected
with_all_three.realistic_estimate: Expect 40-60% of theoretical improvement in live trading

priority_order: 1. Regime Defense Shield (highest confidence, lowest complexity, largest guaranteed improvement)
2. Basin-Aware Pair Router (medium confidence, medium complexity, large improvement)
3. Transition-Triggered Pre-Positioning (lowest confidence, highest complexity, speculative improvement)

key_insights: The topology has a clear BULLISH CHAIN: C4(capitulation) → C3(breakout) → C0(drift) → C2(strong integration) → C8(euphoria). Trading WITH this chain = edge. Trading AGAINST it = destruction.
The BEARISH CHAIN runs: C0(drift) → C7(mild bear) → C6(structured sell) → C1(bear winter). Detecting entry into this chain early is worth more than any entry optimization.
53% of market time is I-dominant (integration). The market WANTS to converge. Mean-reversion pressure is the baseline. Pure trend-following only works in the 26% D-dominant windows.
C7 is the TRAP BASIN — it looks tradeable (14% occupancy, fast transitions) but bleeds $-1463. The fix isn't better entries, it's pair filtering. BTC works here; ETH doesn't.

The forbidden transitions reveal PHYSICAL LAWS of this market: euphoria never goes directly to quiet (C8↛C5), bears never V-reverse into breakouts (C1↛C3), quiet never flash-crashes (C5↛C3/C4/C8). These constraints are exploitable.
Only 4 basins have any trading data: C0, C3, C7, C8 (plus tiny n for C1, C2). Basins C4, C5, C6 are COMPLETELY UNEXPLORED. The largest potential alpha is in the untested territory.
ADA is a regime-specialist: $738 from 5 trades in C8 (euphoria). It thrives in volatile bullish conditions where other pairs struggle. This is a token-personality finding.
The win rate is less important than the win/loss RATIO. C0 (50% WR, 4.3:1 ratio) dramatically outperforms C7 (45.7% WR, 1.0:1 ratio). Asymmetric payoff > high win rate.

D/I/R composition is predictive: I-dominant positive-sign basins (C0, C2, C8) account for ALL positive PnL. I-dominant negative-sign basins (C7) account for the worst losses. The sign of the I-axis IS the edge.
